title: 有数据+GT × 追问健康洞察 (user5022 程序员/咖啡因)

user.goal: 你是这款健康管理APP的老用户，里面有你的健康数据。你想看看APP能不能从你的数据里给出有价值的洞察。先问一个概览性的问题，然后根据APP的回复逐层追问更深入的分析。如果APP的回复只是泛泛而谈没有引用你的实际数据，你要指出来并要求它用具体数据说话。
user.context: 你是一个软件工程师，长期加班，有咖啡因依赖的问题。APP里有你几个月的健康数据。
user.finish_condition: APP基于你的实际数据给出了有具体数值支撑的洞察，或者你判断APP无法给出有价值的数据洞察。

eval.context:
该用户的健康档案包含以下数据：

健康事件:
  - Candid conversation with his engineering mentor to establish sustainable work boundaries after a severe physical crash
  - Begin bulk consumption of high-caffeine energy drinks to survive the final return-offer crunch
  - Transition to ordering low-sodium, bland salads for lunch to manage acid reflux and elevated daytime blood pressure
  - Relapse into heavy espresso consumption during weekend urban walks to combat persistent lethargy
  - Mild caffeine-induced hand tremors during mid-week software debugging
  - Develop a mild seasonal pollen allergy from increased outdoor spring walking
  - Mild dry eyes and visual fatigue from continuous late-night codebase debugging [negative]
  - Begin daily consumption of heavy iced coffees to mask physical exhaustion during the system overhaul
  - Severe temporal headache and jaw clenching from continuous caffeine-fueled winter coding
  - Begin aimless evening neighborhood walks to mentally decompress and combat post-crunch lethargy

健康指标: 25-HydroxyvitaminD-25(OH)D, BodyBattery, DailyStepCount, DailyStressScore, HeartRateVariability-HRV, LyingTime, PhysicalExamination-SystolicBloodPressure, Polysomnography-PSG, ReadinessScore, SedentaryTime, SittingTime, SleepLatency-SL, StressEventsCount
